title: Ramayana Story Path
coreLoop: Answer a story question or resolve a dharma choice to move one space. Cooperative prompts let another player move with you.
unlock: Completing the board unlocks the colorbook cover and family challenge prompt.

title: Dashavatara Match
coreLoop: Match each problem card to the avatar whose story best responds to it, then explain the symbol.
unlock: Three correct explanations unlock the Dashavatara symbol colorbook.

title: The Slow Path
coreLoop: Choose a patient action for a difficult situation and explain what it matures.
unlock: Completing the circle unlocks a talapatra wisdom card.
